description_long: This skateboard features a standard double-kick deck with a black, gritty grip tape covering the top surface, bordered by a natural wood edge. The deck is constructed from layered wood, likely maple, and is supported by two metal trucks attached with visible bolts. The trucks are mounted with four white, classic-style wheels, each appearing to be made of polyurethane. The grip tape is plain and unadorned, providing a high-traction surface for riders. No visible brand logos or deck graphics are present, giving the skateboard a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The overall build and proportions suggest it is designed for street or park use, suitable for tricks and general urban skateboarding.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grip tape deck, natural wood edges, white classic wheels, and metal trucks, designed for street or park use. No visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, black grip tape, natural wood edge, and all four white wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose, black grip tape, and the width of the deck with two wheels partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the skateboard's length, grip tape, and wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded tail, black grip tape, and the deck's width with two wheels partially visible.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard silver metal trucks, top-mounted, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern, graphics, or text
